source.title: Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage/Injury - Green Canyon Block 432

context.region: Gulf of America, Green Canyon Block 432

actions_taken: IP evacuated to West Jefferson Hospital
Onsite investigation conducted by Murphy and TOI
BSEE Houma District investigation performed November 14, 2024
event.summary: On November 10, 2024, at 0145 hours, an injured person (IP) was struck by a wave on the stern of the Transocean Deepwater Invictus drillship during workover operations. Despite being informed during a pre-tour meeting that the stern was secured due to deteriorating weather and building seas (approximately 15-foot waves), the IP entered the restricted area to observe the water. A wave struck the IP, throwing him approximately 20 feet across the rig, causing him to strike a bollard before coming to rest at the base of a stairwell. The IP sustained a fractured right femur and was evacuated to West Jefferson Hospital. The investigation concluded that the IP's failure to observe the secured area and follow supervisor direction contributed significantly to the accident.
recommendations: Determine if there should be restricted areas on the rig during adverse weather conditions and communicate these locations to all personnel during pre-tour and other relevant meetings
Assess helideck capabilities and challenges for landing under adverse weather conditions
Place additional restricted access signs around the rig as needed, based on weather-related restrictions
Conduct a safety meeting for each tour when significant adverse weather is present with focus on adverse weather awareness
BSEE recommends issuing a safety alert/bulletin regarding this incident
key_phrases: stern secured due to bad weather
wave came over the stern striking the IP
failure to observe the secured area
deteriorating weather and rising sea states
wave height at the time of the incident was about 15 feet

threats.name: Personnel entering restricted area during adverse weather

consequences.name: Lost time injury requiring medical evacuation

controls.name: Pre-tour safety meeting with weather briefing
controls.barrier_role: Communicate hazards and restrictions to personnel
controls.lod_basis: Frontline communication of hazards before work begins

supporting_text: a pre-tour meeting was held and the Chief Mate (CM) informed all in attendance that the weather was deteriorating, and the seas were building
The CM told all crew members the stern of the ship was secured (crew members not allowed on stern) due to bad weather
the IP attended the pre-tour safety meeting where the CM warned of the worsening weather and rising sea states

controls.name: Stern area secured/restricted access
controls.barrier_role: Physical/administrative restriction to prevent personnel access to hazardous area
controls.lod_basis: Direct control to prevent exposure to hazard

supporting_text: The stern of the drillship was secured due to the dangers the inclement weather
Despite being told the stern was secured; the IP went to the aft handrail to observe the water
The IP's failure to observe the secured area on the stern contributed significantly to the accident

controls.name: Supervisor direction and work assignment
controls.barrier_role: Direct personnel to safe work locations and tasks
controls.lod_basis: Frontline supervision to control work activities

supporting_text: The IP followed neither the direction of his supervisor nor procedure by entering a secure area
The IP did not have any job duties on the stern of the vessel. His decision to enter this area led to him being struck by a wave

controls.name: Daily crew meeting with task assignments
controls.barrier_role: Ensure personnel understand their assigned tasks and locations

supporting_text: After the pre-tour meeting concluded the roustabout crew held their daily crew meeting where individuals were assigned their specific tasks
The IP was assigned to help the marine crew install a swing gate on crane 2

controls.name: Medic response and stabilization
controls.barrier_role: Provide immediate medical care to injured personnel
controls.lod_basis: Emergency response to minimize injury severity

supporting_text: The medic was immediately notified, and he stabilized the IP's injured leg

controls.name: Medical evacuation capability
controls.barrier_role: Transport injured personnel to advanced medical care
controls.lod_basis: Emergency response to provide definitive medical treatment

supporting_text: The IP was evacuated to West Jefferson Hospital for further medical treatment
He was evacuated to West Jefferson Hospital

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
